heading: Omitted
label: 85 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, acts , ; , ; , ; , , which required all fees collected by registers which would increase their salaries beyond a certain amount to be covered into the Treasury, except for certain clerical fees, was superseded by sections 79c and 79d of this title, which require all fees to be covered into the Treasury.Mar. 3, 1887, ch. 36224 Stat. 526Oct. 28, 1921, ch. 114, § 142 Stat. 208Mar. 3, 1925, ch. 46243 Stat. 1145May 21, 1928, ch. 66145 Stat. 684
